Description: AI conducts async 1:1 interviews with your users, so you get real insights without the scheduling - Set up a research session in minutes; define your topic, upload materials, get AI review and suggestions before you publish - Share a PIN link with participants; AI conducts the full chat interview adapting follow-up questions dynamically - Covers proposed features, pain points, process gaps, and design drafts - AI synthesises all findings into a structured summary, ready to export or share

AI converts unstructured pain points and requests into a standardized FRF-style output - Analyzes sources like SeaTalk messages, slides, and documents - Generates structured sections for business impact, background, and requirements - Streamlines the transition from raw feedback to formal documentation

Built By: Gareth Wang, Huishan, Merry, Phan Nguyen Hong Gam, Qing Wei Chua
Description: Problem Statement: There is currently no existing AI Tool to help requesters ensure their FRF is of good quality. Tool: An FRF Reviewer will score the FRF across several dimensions and generate an overall score based on preset weightages. Recommendations on how to improve the FRF is also provided. Benefits: Requesters get more timely feedback on FRF comprehensiveness and quality. BPMs spend less time doing FRF review.

Real-time timeline recalculation when priority order changes + JIRA status change - Automatically updates estimated UAT start timelines when features are reordered or JIRA statuses change - Estimates UAT duration based on development effort, complexity, and cross-domain dependencies - Adds timeline buffers for features requiring alignment across multiple domains

Tool Name: AI BRD Auditor and Risk Detector

Description: AI tool performs a structured review of BRD drafts to critique, QA, and flag risks - Asks clarifying questions on ambiguous or underspecified requirements - Cross-checks if the solution addresses pain points in the FRF - Flags contradicting logic and validation rules across modules - Identifies loopholes and edge cases not accounted for in the BRD - Detects system, legal, user, and operational risks - Provides suggestions for user approval and updates Google Docs

AI BRD Assistant trained on current system - Understands current system using Confluence docs and UAT testing notes - Compares system data with new requirements to detect gaps and identify impacted logic - Automatically generates Business Requirement Documents (BRDs) based on a divided format

AI workflow for drafting and sending BRD emails to local markets - Retrieves target markets and contact lists to generate recipients, subject lines, and timelines - Facilitates user approval before triggering email distribution - Monitors feedback and email threads to log sign-offs, opt-outs, and personnel updates - Automates follow-up reminders and identifies non-responsive regions - Generates daily reports and a final summary highlighting risks to the BRD owner

Cross-Reference Historical BRDs Assistant - Surfaces relevant edge cases, special handling rules, and legacy logics from historical documents - Identifies conflicts or missing considerations during the drafting of new BRDs - Reduces revision rounds and prevents post-deployment fixes during the review cycle

AI compares BRD against PRD to identify requirement gaps - Automatically identifies missing or changed requirements between documents - Notifies users via SeaTalk to review identified gaps and changes - Facilitates FPM notification via SeaTalk once changes are approved

AI generates a first-draft PRD from a signed-off BRD and template - Maps business requirements to technical components and pre-fills specs - Carries forward edge cases, error states, and out-of-scope items - Flags sections requiring technical decisions for refinement - Enables rapid regeneration when source BRD changes to minimize rework

Description: BRD Update and Stakeholder Notification Assistant - Automatically generates updates to the BRD based on differences identified in the PRD comparison - Directly updates the Google Doc with visual indicators like font color changes upon user approval - Drafts notifications for relevant stakeholders via SeaTalk
